$voiceCadence: calm, decisive — explaining OAuth without sounding technical
$revisionNote: Sandbox auth was down at capture time. Placeholder body/keypoints scenes used instead of authenticated integrations screenshots.

storyboard.onScreenText: Connect your tools — one click each.
storyboard.voiceover: Connect your accounting and field tools to RestoreAssist. One click each.
Open slash dashboard slash integrations. Every supported platform sits on a single page — pick the ones you use.

data.footnote: Dashboard → Integrations · always one click from home.

storyboard.voiceover: Accounting first. Xero, MYOB, or QuickBooks. Pick yours, tap Connect, log in on their site. We never see your password — OAuth handles the rest.
Field service is next. ServiceM8 or Ascora. Same one-click flow. Jobs flow back and forth — schedule once, inspect once, invoice once.
OAuth is the same on every platform. You tap Connect. Their site asks you to approve. They return a secure token. We store the token — never the password.

flowSteps: 1 — Tap Connect on the integration tile.
2 — Approve access on the platform's site.
3 — They return a secure token to RestoreAssist.

storyboard.onScreenText: Sync runs in the background — every change, fire-and-forget.
storyboard.voiceover: After connecting, sync runs in the background. Every invoice, job and contact propagates within a minute. Failures retry on a dead-letter queue.

data.footnote: Failures retry · no user-facing requests blocked.

storyboard.voiceover: Want to disconnect? Same tile, Disconnect button. We revoke the token immediately. Nothing already synced is touched. You stay in control.

keypoints: Synced records stay where they are.
Reconnect anytime — same OAuth, same flow.

storyboard.onScreenText: Connection healthy? Check the Workspace Health page.
storyboard.voiceover: If a sync looks off, open Workspace Health. Each connector reports its live status — last sync, last error, last successful payload.

storyboard.onScreenText: RestoreAssist — One platform, every tool you already use.
storyboard.voiceover: RestoreAssist. One platform, every tool you already use. One National Inspection Standard.
